(Given : h = 6.626 $$\times$$ 10$$-$$34 Js)

2 g of a non-volatile non-electrolyte solute is dissolved in

question_text: A 220 V, 50 Hz AC source is connected to a 25 V, 5 W lamp and an additional resistance R in series (as shown in figure) to run the lamp at its peak brightness, then the value of R (in ohm) will be _____________.

subject: Physics
micro_topic: Huygens Principle And Interference Of Light
question_text: In Young's double slit experiment the two slits are 0.6 mm distance apart. Interference pattern is observed on a screen at a distance 80 cm from the slits. The first dark fringe is observed on the screen directly opposite to one of the slits. The wavelength of light will be ____________ nm.

subject: Physics
question_text:
A beam of monochromatic light is used to excite the electron in Li+ + from the first orbit to the third orbit. The wavelength of monochromatic light is found to be x $$\times$$ 10$$-$$10 m. The value of x is ___________.
[Given hc = 1242 eV nm]

question_text: The current density in a cylindrical wire of radius 4 mm is 4 $$\times$$ 106 Am$$-$$2. The current through the outer portion of the wire between radial distances $${R \over 2}$$ and R is ____________ $$\pi$$ A.

subject: Physics

subject: Physics
micro_topic: Fluid Flow Bernoullis Principle And Viscosity
question_text: The area of cross-section of a large tank is 0.5 m2. It has a narrow opening near the bottom having area of cross-section 1 cm2. A load of 25 kg is applied on the water at the top  in the tank. Neglecting the speed of water in the tank, the velocity of the water, coming out of the opening at the time when the height of water level in the tank is 40 cm above the bottom, will be ___________ cms$$-$$1. [Take g = 10 ms$$-$$2]

subject: Physics
question_text: A pendulum of length 2 m consists of a wooden bob of mass 50 g. A bullet of mass 75 g is fired towards the stationary bob with a speed v. The bullet emerges out of the bob with a speed $${v \over 3}$$ and the bob just completes the vertical circle. The value of v is ___________ ms$$-$$1. (if g = 10 m/s2).
